content:
<act>
<tool>graph.plan</tool>
<objective>Create structured science-fiction story bible for chronos-fracture</objective>
<constraints>root=stories/chronos-fracture; kind=story; no .md suffix; all dirs need README.md + 2 children; each MD <160 lines; concrete content only; no placeholders or full manuscript yet</constraints>
<assumptions>owner will provide story seed after plan is recorded</assumptions>
<risks>first owner message not sufficient for complete plan -> record graph.plan before mutating tools</risks>
<steps>1. create root dir 2. create all subdirs 3. write README.md + catalog.toml at root 4. batch-write each subdir's content files 5. verify structure and line counts 6. audit document-structure and artifact-readiness</steps>
<checks>all dirs have README.md; all MDs <160 lines; no placeholder text; concrete story bible content</checks>
<path=stories/chronos-fracture</path>
<reason>owner task requires structured plan before file mutations to satisfy graph completion gate</reason>
</act>
